title: AN ACT CREATING THE POSITIONS OF TWO ASSISTANT CITY ATTORNEYS FOR OZAMIZ CITY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION TWENTY-FOUR OF THE CHARTER OF SAID CITY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4114 / 62 OG No. 22, 3745 (May 30, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4237, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE POSITIONS OF TWO ASSISTANT CITY ATTORNEYS FOR OZAMIZ CITY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION TWENTY-FOUR OF THE CHARTER OF SAID CITY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The first paragraph of Section twenty-four of Republic Act Numbered Three hundred twenty-one, otherwise known as the Charter of Ozamiz City, is amended to read as follows:

"SEC. 24.

The City Attorney â his assistants â his powers and duties.

â The Law Department shall consist of the city attorney who shall be the chief legal adviser of the city and two assistant city attorneys. The city attorney shall receive a salary of five thousand one hundred pesos

per annum

and the two assistant city attorneys, four thousand two hundred pesos each

per annum

. The city attorney shall have the following powers and duties:"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
